title: Emergency Torch
description: Ever found yourself having run out of torches while exploring one of the new caves and cliffs caves, with no coal in sight? Ever been in this situation but still had access to wood and sticks and desperately needed light? This mod is for you!
body:
**Description:**
-
Ever found yourself having run out of torches while exploring one of the new caves and cliffs caves, with no coal in sight? Ever been in this situation but still had access to wood and sticks and desperately needed light? This mod is for you! It allows you to craft a temporary light source from nothing but sticks, and a log or gravel! The operating term being temporary, it only lasts for a minute after being placed.

**How to use:**
-
- Craft a stick.
- Place stick in crafting slot to get a torch handle.
- Right-click gravel, or any wood log to obtain a temporary torch.
- Place temporary torches just like a regular torch; however, they will burn out after 1 minute.

**Images:**
-
![Burnt out torches.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4003a37644ed427b05a5346212d7b34fd785a0c6.png)

**Dependencies:**
-
- fabricloader 0.15.3
